race.comment: A TOUCH FROM FAYT (6) hasn't won for a long while but finds a far easier race today. Has showed pace but failed to finish off at her last few. Won't find the chasing pack anywhere near as formidable this time so a long-awaited win is on the cards. CHARLOTTE'S HERE (3) didn't cope with 1540m last time out when beaten a long way at the Gold Coast poly. Placed at three of five runs over this distance and will appreciate returning to the turf. Watch for a spike in form. TORVECCHIO (10) surrendered an early lead and failed to recover last start over 1350m at Ipswich. Back in trip a slight query but in a weak field she has the talent to play a key role. RUSSIAN PINS (4) has been plain all prep, the last couple on the Gold Coast poly. Trialled well since the last run and is open to improvement against this lot. CONSTANT CAFE (1) resumes. Finished fourth overt this trip at her only appearance last prep. In the mix off an 18-week break with blinkers on.
